# Pinned dependency for formal-verification workflow (hash-verified).
#
# Regenerate the hash after bumping the version:
#   pip download --no-deps z3-solver==4.16.0.0
#   sha256sum z3_solver-4.16.0.0-py3-none-manylinux_2_27_x86_64.whl
#
# Only the manylinux_2_27 x86_64 wheel is required because the
# formal-verification runner pins `runs-on: ubuntu-24.04`.
z3-solver==4.16.0.0 \
    --hash=sha256:afae2551f795670f0522cfce82132d129c408a2694adff71eb01ba0f2ece44f9
